fix(readme): fix pre-commit hooks and regenerate README/TILES from actual skills (#8)

* fix(readme): fix lefthook sync hooks and regenerate README/TILES from actual skills

- Fix lefthook.yml: move readme-sync, yamllint, shellcheck, tessl-lint
  into the commands block (were incorrectly nested at pre-commit level
  and never ran)
- Widen readme-sync trigger glob from .context/audits/*.md to
  {skills/**,cli/**,.context/audits/**} so it fires on any skill change
- Add TILES.md to the files regenerated and staged by readme-sync
- Fix tile-parser to skip private child tiles when parent dir has a
  tile.json (prevents opencode sub-skills appearing as 9 separate tiles)
- Fix trailing double newline in generated README.md causing MD012 errors
- Add languages domain to domain-config.ts for future skill discoverability
- Regenerate README.md and TILES.md: now accurately reflects 48 tiles

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Get Jobs ($999/month): Now includes 7-day free trial

Get Jobs: https://pay.devhouseai.com/b/9B68wQ1uK9OP8iu7CyenS02

- Get Found ($499/month): https://pay.devhouseai.com/b/5kQbJ21uKf990Q21eaenS01
- Get Jobs ($999/month): https://pay.devhouseai.com/b/9B68wQ1uK9OP8iu7CyenS02

Switch weather API from open-meteo to wttr.in (Sydney)

- Map precipMM → rain_mm, windspeedKmph → wind_speed_kph
- Use winddir16Point directly as wind_direction (compass string)
- Update timeout from 5s to 10s
- Add weatherSource: 'wttr.in/Sydney' to response
- Remove degreesToCardinal helper (no longer needed)

commit.message:
Add TODAY_ACTION_PLAN.md: Complete 3-4 hour implementation guide

Step-by-step walkthrough to go live:
1. Create Stripe account + payment links (30 min)
2. Install GA4 (30 min)
3. Launch Google Ads campaign $20/day (45 min)
4. Create cold email list (1 hour)
5. Send first batch of cold emails (30 min)
6. Track daily + weekly

By end of day: Payment system live, leads flowing from 2 sources, sales process ready.

This is the 'do this now' guide to start revenue generation immediately.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Preserve Dapr configuration on container app deployment (#7062)

* Fix: preserve Dapr configuration during container app deployment

Co-authored-by: spboyer <7681382+spboyer@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: improve Dapr preservation error handling and add 404 test

- Handle 404 (first deploy) explicitly in persistSettings instead of
  swallowing all errors — proceed without persisting when app does not
  exist yet
- Fail on non-404 errors when Dapr preservation is needed to prevent
  silent config wipe (correctness-critical path)
- Add test for first-deploy scenario (GET 404) verifying no Dapr
  config is injected
- Fix pre-existing cspell issues (projectpkg, agentserver)
- Apply go fix modernizations (to.Ptr -> new)

repository.description: Miscellaneous reusable GitHub Called Workflows for common platform automation tasks.

commit.message:
ci: fix release workflow — handle no existing tags

* feat(db): add Prisma schema with User, Profile, Document, NDA models

- User model with role (CREATIVE/COMPANY) and plan enum
- ProfileCreative: fullName, birthDate, birthPlace, codiceFiscale, partitaIva
- ProfileCompany: ragioneSociale, formaGiuridica, sede, SDI, referente
- Document: file metadata + SHA-256 hash for IP timestamping
- NdaAgreement + NdaClause + NdaAgreementClause junction table
- prisma.config.ts for datasource configuration

* chore: update dependencies and config for MVP stack

- Add tRPC, @tanstack/react-query, NextAuth, Prisma, bcryptjs, zod
- Add Shadcn/ui, lucide-react, class-variance-authority
- Update .gitignore for generated prisma client
- Add Shadcn components.json config

* feat(api): add tRPC routers, NextAuth config, and Prisma client

- tRPC context with session + prisma, public + protected procedures
- Auth router: 7 multi-step signup procedures + me query
- Document router: create, list, getById with SHA-256 hash
- NDA router: create, list, getById, accept (clickwrap with IP logging)
- NextAuth credentials provider with JWT strategy
- Prisma client singleton with pg adapter
- TypeScript augmentations for next-auth session types

* feat(api): add NextAuth and tRPC API route handlers

- /api/auth/[...nextauth] — NextAuth handler
- /api/trpc/[trpc] — tRPC fetch adapter handler

* feat(ui): add Shadcn/ui components and SessionProvider

- Accordion, Badge, Button, Card, Checkbox, Input, Label, Separator, Tabs
- NextAuth SessionProvider wrapper for client components

* feat(auth): implement multi-step signup and login flow

- Splash page with rainbow gradient logo + auto-redirect
- Login page: email/password + SPID/CIE layout buttons (disabled)
- Profile selection: Creativo (yellow) / Azienda (blue) cards
- Multi-step signup wizard with progress bar (6 steps creative, 7 company)
- StepSignup, StepPersonalInfo, StepCompanyInfo, StepCompanyReferent
- StepPhone, StepOTP (mock: accepts 123456), StepPlan

* feat(dashboard): add home feed, NDA creation, and document upload

- Home feed with FeedCard component (preview, title, type badge, SHA hash)
- FilterMenu with type filter (Timestamp/NDA/Contract) and sort
- Tabs (Tutti/Inviati/Non inviati) and FAB button
- NDA creation form: title, description, duration selector, clause checklist
- Document upload: drag & drop, client-side SHA-256 hash, title input

* feat(layout): dark mode root layout with TRPCProvider

- Dark mode HTML class + Inter/Geist fonts
- TRPCProvider + SessionProvider wrappers
- Shadcn/ui CSS design tokens (dark theme)
- Splash page with rainbow gradient logo

* chore(docker): add multi-stage Dockerfile and compose

- Multi-stage build: deps → build (prisma generate) → production runner
- docker-compose.yml: PostgreSQL 16 + app with health checks
- .dockerignore for optimized build context
- Enable standalone output in next.config.ts

* docs: update README and AGENTS, refresh .gitignore

* fix: code review — type safety, route protection, remove starter assets

- NdaStatus enum in schema; add recipientId index
- protectedProcedure narrows session to non-null
- Remove OTP fallback hardcode (throws BAD_REQUEST if no OTP)
- Remove unused name state in StepSignup
- FeedCard: replace manual DocItem with inferRouterOutputs
- nda/new: replace CLAUSE_TEMPLATES with trpc.nda.getClauses query
- BrandLogo component; remove inline gradient from login and home
- proxy.ts: route protection via withAuth (Next.js 16 convention)
- staleTime: 60_000 on QueryClient
- NEXTAUTH_SECRET guard at boot
- Remove default Next.js starter SVGs from public/

* feat(ui): brand redesign — splash sequence, profile select, login restyling

- Splash: motion SVG → black → logo fade-in/scale; tap or 3s auto-navigate
- BrandLogo: per-letter brand colors, withIcon prop (icon-logo.svg)
- Rename iconLogo.svg → icon-logo.svg (kebab-case convention)
- Button: rounded-full pill shape globally
- Login: SPID/CIE pill buttons with green border, privacy links highlighted, fade-out on success
- Profile select: vertical cards with brand copy, info modal (Dialog) per profile type
- Add shadcn Dialog component
- Add prisma initial migration

* fix: security hardening — rate limiting, OTP, password denylist, tRPC session fix

* fix: resolve Copilot review — tab filtering, NDA guard, key prop, rename step, remove rate limiter; add MVP philosophy to AGENTS

* Update src/app/page.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(session): guard async busy lock with pcall to prevent permanent deadlock (#21)

All three async.void functions (select_tool, select_session, rename_session)
called the inner _() function bare. If ui_select or ui_input (both async.wrap
callbacks) threw a runtime error, state.busy would remain true permanently,
deadlocking the plugin until Neovim restart.

- Replace bare _() with pcall(_) in select_tool, select_session, rename_session
- Ensure state.busy = false always executes on both success and error paths
- Notify the user with [aiwaku] prefixed ERROR message when an unexpected error occurs
- Add missing ---@async annotation to select_session and rename_session

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update package.json

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Auto-refresh JWT token in background when user roles or role permissions change (#356)

* Initial plan

* feat: auto-refresh JWT token when user roles or role permissions change

- UpdateUserRoles now regenerates security stamp and invalidates cache after
  successful role update, causing the user's next request to get a 401 which
  the frontend interceptor handles by calling RefreshToken
- EditRole now finds all users assigned the edited role and invalidates their
  security stamp caches so their tokens are refreshed with updated permissions
- SecurityStampValidationTransform in gateway now skips stamp validation for
  RefreshToken endpoint to avoid infinite 401 loops during token refresh
- UsersService.RefreshToken now correctly fetches the user with roles/permissions
  and generates a fresh token (removes broken RefreshTokenAsync call that
  compared access token against stored refresh token, always failing)
- Adds tests: UpdateUserRoles_RegeneratesSecurityStampAndInvalidatesCache and
  EditRole_RegeneratesSecurityStampForAffectedUsers

Co-authored-by: PSPTorchinim <47593054+PSPTorchinim@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore: remove accidentally committed Windows build artifact from git tracking

Co-authored-by: PSPTorchinim <47593054+PSPTorchinim@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore: rebase onto releases/R2602 - bring in HTTP 500 roles fix

- Add RoleWithUsersSpec for safe Users navigation include in DeleteRole
- RolesService.GetRoles now returns List<GetRoleDTO> (caches DTOs to avoid circular refs)
- RolesService.AddRole caches DTOs instead of entities in the All-roles cache
- RolesService.DeleteRole uses RoleWithUsersSpec with null-safe Users check
- RolesController.GetRolesV1 ProducesResponseType updated to IEnumerable<GetRoleDTO>
- Remove unused 'using IdentityAPI.Entities' from RolesController
- RolesServiceTests updated: List<GetRoleDTO> cache mocks, ISpecification matchers for DeleteRole
- .gitignore: add **/obj\** pattern to block Windows build artifacts

Co-authored-by: PSPTorchinim <47593054+PSPTorchinim@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correctly extract LoginResponseDTO from API response wrapper in refresh token interceptor

The v1UsersRefreshTokenList() endpoint returns LoginResponseDTOResponse
(shape: { success, data: LoginResponseDTO, message, errors }).
The interceptor was casting response.data as LoginResponseDTO, so user/
accessToken/refreshToken all resolved to undefined → null, clearing
localStorage on every successful token refresh.

Fix: access response.data.data (the inner LoginResponseDTO) so the correct
fields are read and localStorage is updated instead of cleared.

Co-authored-by: PSPTorchinim <47593054+PSPTorchinim@users.noreply.github.com>

* format:fix

* style: run prettier on Button.tsx and Input.tsx

Merge interface extends clause onto a single line per prettier rules
(printWidth: 80, singleQuote: true, trailingComma: all).

Co-authored-by: PSPTorchinim <47593054+PSPTorchinim@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: PSPTorchinim <47593054+PSPTorchinim@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Hubert Troć <huberttroc@gmail.com>

fix(session): reopen sidebar in current tab on toggle (#19)

Previously, state.win_id stored a single global window handle with no
awareness of which tabpage it belonged to. win_visible() only checked
nvim_win_is_valid(), so a sidebar open in tab 1 was still treated as
"visible" when the user moved to tab 2. The first toggle from tab 2
therefore closed the tab 1 window and returned early, requiring a
second toggle to actually open the sidebar in tab 2.

Changes:
- window.lua: add win_visible_in_current_tab() that checks both window
  validity and current tabpage membership.
- session.lua: add local close_sidebar_window() helper; switch
  toggle() and open_session() to use win_visible_in_current_tab() so
  the sidebar is treated as hidden when it lives in another tab.
  open_session() closes any existing sidebar window before opening a
  fresh split in the current tab, moving the sidebar in one press.
  new_session() and clear_context() use the new helper for consistent
  unconditional close behaviour.
- send.lua: switch send_to_session() to win_visible_in_current_tab()
  so send_selection() and send_buffer() also auto-open in the current
  tab rather than acting on a sidebar that exists only in another tab.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Move md_get_pdb_id to dnmd_pdb.h and reduce CI matrix (#70)

* Move md_get_pdb_id to dnmd_pdb.h and fix size query pattern

Move the md_get_pdb_id declaration from dnmd.h to dnmd_pdb.h where
it belongs alongside other Portable PDB APIs.

Fix the implementation to always write back the required buffer size
before checking if the caller's buffer is large enough, enabling
callers to query the needed size with a too-small buffer.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Reduce CI matrix to sparse configuration

Replace the full 12-leg matrix (3 OS × 2 flavors × 2 vendored) with
a sparse 8-leg matrix to reduce CI costs while maintaining coverage:
- Ubuntu: Debug and Release, both vendored modes (4 legs)
- macOS: Debug vendored, Release non-vendored (2 legs)
- Windows: Release vendored, Debug non-vendored (2 legs)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix SSH deployment with direct ssh commands instead of appleboy action

Use native ssh with proper key handling for more reliable deployment

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update app/events/routes.py, store recent 50 events instead of infinite

Storing created_events in Flask’s default client-side session can overflow the signed cookie size if many lines are submitted, causing requests to fail. Consider limiting what’s stored (e.g., last N events) or persisting server-side instead of putting the full list into the session cookie.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Sync eng/common directory with azure-sdk-tools for PR 14461 (#2149)

* Add DirectoryFilterPattern parameter to regeneration pipeline

Add DirectoryFilterPattern parameter to archetype-typespec-emitter.yml
and New-RegenerateMatrix.ps1 to allow filtering the regeneration matrix
by package directory name pattern.

This enables azure-sdk-for-net's http-client-csharp-mgmt CI to only
regenerate Azure.ResourceManager* SDKs instead of all TypeSpec SDKs.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Handle empty filter results with array wrapping and early error

Address review feedback: wrap filtered results in @() to ensure
reliable .Count, and fail fast with a clear error when no directories
match the filter pattern.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Support comma-separated filter patterns

Update DirectoryFilterPattern to split on commas and match any pattern,
so callers can filter to multiple SDK prefixes (e.g.,
'Azure.ResourceManager*,Azure.Provisioning*').

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Wei Hu <live1206@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

app/services/__init__.py, use double quotes instead of single quotes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add md_get_pdb_id API for reading PDB identity from #Pdb stream (#69)

Add a new public API, md_get_pdb_id(), guarded by DNMD_PORTABLE_PDB,
that extracts the 20-byte PDB ID (GUID + stamp) from the #Pdb stream
of a portable PDB file. This enables consumers to validate that a PDB
file matches a PE assembly by comparing the PDB ID against the
CodeView debug directory entry in the PE.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Add .github/workflows/validate-report-bpa.yml triggered on report/bpa changes
- Add alt text to all 3 visuals in Games Report to pass the new BPA checks

Rules:
  - REPORT_VISUAL_WITHIN_BOUNDS (Error)
  - REPORT_NO_OVERLAPPING_VISUALS (Warning)
  - REPORT_VISUAL_HAS_PROJECTIONS (Error)
  - REPORT_PAGE_HAS_DISPLAY_NAME (Warning)
  - REPORT_MAX_VISUALS_PER_PAGE max=6 (Info)
  - REPORT_VISUAL_HAS_ALT_TEXT (Warning)
  - REPORT_TEXT_SIZE_MIN_12PX min=12 (Warning)

🔧 Fix OCR, AI marking, and markscheme detection issues

## Problems Fixed

1. **Environment variables not loading in dev**
   - Added dotenv to automatically load .env file
   - API keys (MISTRAL_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, EXA_API_KEY) now properly loaded

2. **Automatic markscheme detection disabled**
   - Re-enabled detectAndFetchMarkscheme() function
   - Implemented full detection flow with Sonar + Exa fallback
   - Auto-saves detected markscheme to submission

3. **Poor error handling and logging**
   - Enhanced OCR client with detailed logging (character counts, caching info)
   - Enhanced AI grading with step-by-step logging
   - Added comprehensive detection logging with emoji indicators
   - Better error messages for debugging

## Changes

- dev.ts: Added dotenv config() call
- src/lib/ocr/client.ts: Enhanced error handling + logging
- src/lib/ai/client.ts: Enhanced error handling + logging
- src/lib/ai/detection.ts: Re-enabled with comprehensive logging
- src/server/api/submissions.ts: Enabled /detect-markscheme endpoint
- package.json: Added dotenv dependency

## Testing

✅ All systems verified locally:
- Health check returns all services as true
- API keys properly loaded in development
- Frontend running on :5173
- Backend running on :3000
